text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The entrance is the gateway through which all
types of qi passes! Keep it spotless to prevent any
unwelcome energy from coming into your home!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next, maybe I should focus on boosting
luck for a successful career? For an Umamusume,
that means winning races!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll clean all the light fixtures, and it'll
raise everyone's chances of success!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I've worked up a good sweat. It takes so
much stamina to clean the higher up areas.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Are you... the Dragon God?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm flying on the Dragon God's back! This is
incredible! I can see the whole town from up here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? This qi current... could there be dragon
holes over there too?! I had no idea!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! I can see the veins of qi so clearly!
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...More! More! Give me the earth's power!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where am I? Oh... that's right... I took a
break after cleaning. And then... I must have
fallen asleep and had a dream?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but that dream was definitely a message
from the Dragon God.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If the spot it showed me really contains a dragon
hole, then I'll be able to use the earth's power to
further improve my running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Copano Rickey gains some feng
shui-inspired insight, and her track performance
becomes even sharper from that day onward.
